subcodes.first_line: O companion and confidant of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thy letter of 14 June 1913 hath been received. Praise be unto the handmaiden of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای همدم و ندیم عبدالبهاء نامه چهاردهم یونیو سنه ۹۱۳ رسید ستایش از امة الله
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
